titleStmt.title: SII 17.542: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 542. (A.R. No. 500 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This records the gift of 2 vēli of land in three plots, made tax-free in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻanallūr in Umbaḷa-nāḍu by Maḻuvāḍi Chelvaṉ of Pūṇḍi for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār.

Among the boundaries of the second plot of land is mentioned the dēvadāṉa land of Tiruttāṉtōṉṟīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Vēṭkuṉṟūr and among those of the third are mentioned the piece of land puḻaikkaḍaichchey belonging to Teṉṉavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, land in Vāyalūr and a highway (peruvaḻi.)

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .... tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku pūṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ maḻuvāṭi
celvaṉ vaitta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Umpaḷanāṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻanallūriṟ koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu viṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai
kaṇapati yuḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai kiḻakku meṟkāṉa peruvaḻi Oḻukkaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ciṅkaṉ pulattu vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai kuḷamaṭaic ceykkuṅ kaṇṇa vetaṉ ceykkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Oṉṟarai Innilam Oṉṟaraiyum Iṅku viṭṭuk kuṟicci
yuṭaiyāṉ periyāṉ paṉantiṭaikku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai veṭkuṉṟūrt tiruttāṉ toṉṟiccuramuṭaiyār tevatāṉam Ūṟ kiḻiṟaiyili pūvāṅkuḻikku vaṭak
ku melpāṟkellai kuṟicci yuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ periyāṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyāṉ maṉaic ceykkuṅ kuṭiyirupput toṭṭattuk
kut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa māntoṭṭamuṅ kuḷamum meṭṭucceyyum nilaṅkāle Araimā Iṅku viṭṭu vāyalūr
ellaikku teṟkuk kāṭṭup peruvaḻi Oḻukkaikkuk kiḻakkut toṭṭamuṅ kuḷattukkuṅ kiḻpāṟkellai teṉṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ puḻaikkaṭai
cceykku meṟkun teṉpāṟ kellai meṟpaṭiyāṉ toṭṭattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vāyalūr nilattukkut te
ṟkum Āka Icaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilan nāṉmā varai Āka nilam Iruveliyum Innilam Iruveliyum paṉmarkeccura Irakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.542 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
